title: Test Automation Engineer
description: Cloudflare is seeking a Test Automation Engineer to ensure the reliability and security of our global network infrastructure. You'll design automated tests, improve test coverage, and collaborate with development teams to catch issues early. Work hybrid from Houston for a cybersecurity leader protecting millions of internet properties.
responsibilities: Design and develop automated test scripts using industry-standard frameworks
Expand test coverage across critical platform components
Execute test plans and report findings with detailed documentation
Collaborate with engineering teams on test strategy and requirements
Maintain and improve automated test infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
skills: Test automation frameworks (Selenium, Cypress, Jest, or similar)

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
